document.title: MI63-03303A SHEET-GF FRONT DECO ONE BODY 승인원

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and inspection package for SHEET-GF FRONT DECO ONE BODY part MI63-03303A, model F4335-AW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval, inspection, process quality control, reliability testing, hazardous substance checks, and packaging recyclability declaration for the supplied part.
keyPoints: Document code and SEC code are MI63-03303A for SHEET-GF FRONT DECO ONE BODY.
Model is F4335-AW and vendor/manufacturer is identified as Hansung P&I.
Dimensional specification is width 455.60 mm and length/height 379.60 mm with ±0.3 mm tolerance.
Material is identified as PC EMBO or matte PC 0.254T, with ST-9108 tape specification.
Approval conclusion states approved and judgment passed.
Inspection and XRF hazardous substance checks are recorded as accepted or passed.

Hazardous substance inspection follows Samsung Electronics hazardous substance management criteria.
